title: Show Relationship
description: How two shows are related. References are scoped to the same get_products response. Symmetric types (companion, crossover) do not require both shows to declare the relationship.

enumDescriptions.spinoff: A show derived from the referenced show (e.g., an after-show or character spinoff)
enumDescriptions.companion: A companion show (behind-the-scenes, reaction, or supplementary content)
enumDescriptions.sequel: A continuation of the referenced show
enumDescriptions.prequel: A predecessor to the referenced show
enumDescriptions.crossover: Shows that share episodes, guests, or story arcs
